prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `6ea4a07e`.
codex_response:
Implemented `6ea4a07e` as a new ARC2 task package. The rule is a 3x3 foreground/background inversion with color remap `3→1`, `5→4`, `8→2`; the summary hint was used because it matched the official examples exactly, so no `notes.md` was needed. The verifier is in [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_6ea4a07e/verifier.py#L4), the generator is in [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_6ea4a07e/generator.py#L4), and package wiring plus `MAX_EXAMPLES` is in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_6ea4a07e/__init__.py#L5). The generator stays in-family by sampling 3x3 single-color masks from `{3,5,8}` with 2-5 active cells, biased toward the 3-4 cell cases seen in training. No new primitive was added.

Validation passed end-to-end: official examples `8/8`, generated examples `1000/1000`, and I visually checked [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/6ea4a07e/previews/preview_01.png). Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/6ea4a07e/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/6ea4a07e/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/6ea4a07e/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/6ea4a07e/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/6ea4a07e/previews/preview_03.png).
